THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT RICE, ROBERT ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $212.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $212.00, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
